title: Tier 3: End-to-end integration tests
description: Add comprehensive end-to-end tests covering the full workflow from init to integrate. Tests should verify: (1) init creates correct structure, (2) sense analyzes project correctly, (3) compose generates correct graph, (4) dispatch returns correct manifest, (5) run executes deterministic actions, (6) state transitions work, (7) checks run correctly, (8) gate evaluation works, (9) full workflow completes end-to-end. Use real project structure, not mocks.

audit_log.message: profile patched, graph recomposed, state primed
